news.title: New York Fed’s Williams sees inflation peaking at 4%
news.description: Investing.com -- New York Federal Reserve President John Williams said Wednesday that inflation remains too high at about 4% but may have reached its peak and should begin declining in the coming quarters.

news.title: United raises 2026 outlook despite warning of $6 billion fuel cost hit
news.description: Investing.com -- United Airlines (NASDAQ: UAL) reported better-than-expected second-quarter earnings on Wednesday and raised its full-year adjusted profit forecast, even as the carrier warned that a renewed surge in oil prices will add nearly $6 billion to its fuel bill this year.
